page_metadata.biotools__summary: BayPR (Empirical Bayes Inference for Prevalence Ratios) is an R package that estimates the prevalence ratio of an exposure in a population of cases and a reference population using samples from each population.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BayPR (Empirical Bayes Inference for Prevalence Ratios) is an R package that estimates the prevalence ratio of an exposure in a population of cases and a reference population using samples from each population.
